response.justification: Despite extensive experience across multiple languages and domains, the candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, real-time traffic integration, or navigation data tiling — core requirements for the role. Their work with DLang and Node.js in GIS is relevant but insufficient to substitute for the required low-level systems expertise and routing-specific domain knowledge.
strengths: Extensive open-source GIS experience with GISCollective
Proven ability to work across full stack and diverse tech environments
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or map tile systems
Lacks evidence of distributed systems work for low-latency geospatial pipelines
Geospatial work is mostly web-based, not production routing tile optimization
